inspirational.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
inspirational.author: Steve Jobs

inspirational.text: I have not failed. I've just found 10,000 ways that won't work.
inspirational.author: Thomas A. Edison

inspirational.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
inspirational.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

inspirational.text: Everything you've ever wanted is on the other side of fear.
inspirational.author: George Addair

inspirational.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
inspirational.author: Winston Churchill

love.text: The best thing to hold onto in life is each other.
love.author: Audrey Hepburn

love.text: Love all, trust a few, do wrong to none.
love.author: William Shakespeare

love.text: We accept the love we think we deserve.
love.author: Stephen Chbosky
love.source: The Perks of Being a Wallflower

love.text: To love and be loved is to feel the sun from both sides.
love.author: David Viscott
love.source: Finding Your Strength in Difficult Times

love.text: Love is composed of a single soul inhabiting two bodies.
love.author: Aristotle

humor.text: I'm not afraid of death; I just don't want to be there when it happens.
humor.author: Woody Allen

humor.text: Always remember that you are absolutely unique. Just like everyone else.
humor.author: Margaret Mead

humor.text: If you think you are too small to make a difference, try sleeping with a mosquito.
humor.author: Dalai Lama

humor.text: I used to think I was indecisive, but now I'm not so sure.
humor.author: Tommy Cooper

humor.text: The only mystery in life is why the kamikaze pilots wore helmets.
humor.author: Al McGuire

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu

wisdom.text: It is during our darkest moments that we must focus to see the light.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: The unexamined life is not worth living.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Yesterday I was clever, so I wanted to change the world. Today I am wise, so I am changing myself.
wisdom.author: Rumi

success.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
success.author: Albert Schweitzer

success.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
success.author: Henry David Thoreau

success.text: Don't be afraid to give up the good to go for the great.
success.author: John D. Rockefeller

success.text: Success is walking from failure to failure with no loss of enthusiasm.
success.author: Winston Churchill

success.text: The road to success and the road to failure are almost exactly the same.
success.author: Colin R. Davis

career.text: Choose a job you love, and you will never have to work a day in your life.
career.author: Confucius

career.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
career.author: Steve Jobs

career.text: Your work is going to fill a large part of your life, and the only way to be truly satisfied is to do what you believe is great work.
career.author: Steve Jobs

career.text: Find out what you like doing best and get someone to pay you for doing it.
career.author: Katherine Whitehorn

career.text: The harder you work, the luckier you get.
career.author: Gary Player

leadership.text: A leader is one who knows the way, goes the way, and shows the way.
leadership.author: John C. Maxwell

leadership.text: Leadership is not about being in charge. It's about taking care of those in your charge.
leadership.author: Simon Sinek

leadership.text: The greatest leader is not necessarily the one who does the greatest things. He is the one that gets people to do the greatest things.
leadership.author: Ronald Reagan

leadership.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
leadership.author: Steve Jobs

leadership.text: Before you are a leader, success is all about growing yourself. When you become a leader, success is all about growing others.
leadership.author: Jack Welch

life.text: Life is what happens while you're busy making other plans.
life.author: John Lennon

life.text: In three words I can sum up everything I've learned about life: it goes on.
life.author: Robert Frost

life.text: Life is really simple, but we insist on making it complicated.
life.author: Confucius

life.text: Life isn't about finding yourself. Life is about creating yourself.
life.author: George Bernard Shaw

life.text: The purpose of life is not to be happy. It is to be useful, to be honorable, to be compassionate, to have it make some difference that you have lived and lived well.
life.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson
